title: Ryoma Joins
overview: Dr. Saotome recruits the first Getter pilot a young martial artist by the name of Ryoma Nagare.

title: Hayato is Coming
overview: Dr. Saotome and Ryoma atempt to recruit the second Getter pilot Hayato Jin the leader of a criminal gang.

title: Benkei Musashibou
overview: The Oni attack monastery leaving oly one survivor a monk named Benkei Musashibou. Dr. Saotome belives Benkei to be the third Getter pilot.

title: Three Animals Go!
overview: Ryoma, Hayato and Benkei clash over Ryoma's attatude and reckless behaviour.

title: Oni Fire
overview: Ryoma tired of waiting to be attacked decides to follow an escaping Oni to find where they are coming from, meanwhile an archaeological dig turns up the skulls of dead Oni.

title: The Mansion Where the Oni Dwell
overview: The Getter and it's three pilots are seperated and sent to an altered past where the humans and Oni are at war.

title: The Ying-Yang Master
overview: Still in the past Hayato and Benkei are reunited with the Getter. Ryoma attacks the Oni mansion.

title: Collision
overview: The Getter and the human army storm the Oni City, Ryoma goes after Seimei.

title: Hell's Upheaval
overview: After returning home the Getter is upgraded and Ryoma gets a glimpse of a terrible future.

title: Lone Wolf
overview: After his vision of the future Ryoma leaves as Seimei returns to once again battle the Getter.

title: Thus the Divine Wind Blows
overview: Benkei attempts to destroy the Getter leading to a fight with Ryoma. Hayato learns more about the getter rays.

title: Heaven and Earth
overview: "Gods" arrive on earth to battle the Getter, the prototype Getters begin to act alone without pilots.

title: There Goes Ryoma
overview: The three pilots begin to fuse to the Getter as they battle with the "Gods".
